name: Honest Hank's Used Cars
description: Hank Tomlinson started this lot in 1987 after twenty years as a fleet mechanic. He still inspects every car personally, prints the full Carfax for the customer, and tells you what's wrong with it before you ask. His tagline is on the back of every receipt: 'I'd rather lose the sale than lose your trust.'
signature_line: What you see is what you get — let me show you the records.
